root_text.an10.76:1.1: “Tayome, bhikkhave, dhammā loke na saṁvijjeyyuṁ, na tathāgato loke uppajjeyya arahaṁ sammāsambuddho, na tathāgatappavedito dhammavinayo loke dibbeyya.
root_text.an10.76:1.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhammā loke na saṁvijjeyyuṁ, na tathāgato loke uppajjeyya arahaṁ sammāsambuddho, na tathāgatappavedito dhammavinayo loke dibbeyya.
root_text.an10.76:1.5: Yasmā ca kho, bhikkhave, ime tayo dhammā loke saṁvijjanti tasmā tathāgato loke uppajjati arahaṁ sammāsambuddho, tasmā tathāgatappavedito dhammavinayo loke dibbati.
root_text.an10.76:2.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo jātiṁ pahātuṁ jaraṁ pahātuṁ maraṇaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:2.3: Rāgaṁ appahāya, dosaṁ appahāya, mohaṁ appahāya—
root_text.an10.76:2.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme appahāya abhabbo jātiṁ pahātuṁ jaraṁ pahātuṁ maraṇaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:3.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo rāgaṁ pahātuṁ dosaṁ pahātuṁ mohaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:3.3: Sakkāyadiṭṭhiṁ appahāya, vicikicchaṁ appahāya, sīlabbataparāmāsaṁ appahāya—
root_text.an10.76:3.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme appahāya abhabbo rāgaṁ pahātuṁ dosaṁ pahātuṁ mohaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:4.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo sakkāyadiṭṭhiṁ pahātuṁ vicikicchaṁ pahātuṁ sīlabbataparāmāsaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:4.3: Ayonisomanasikāraṁ appahāya, kummaggasevanaṁ appahāya, cetaso līnattaṁ appahāya—
root_text.an10.76:4.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme appahāya abhabbo sakkāyadiṭṭhiṁ pahātuṁ vicikicchaṁ pahātuṁ sīlabbataparāmāsaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:5.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo ayoniso manasikāraṁ pahātuṁ kummaggasevanaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso līnattaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:5.3: Muṭṭhassaccaṁ appahāya, asampajaññaṁ appahāya, cetaso vikkhepaṁ appahāya—
root_text.an10.76:5.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme appahāya abhabbo ayonisomanasikāraṁ pahātuṁ kummaggasevanaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso līnattaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:6.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo muṭṭhassaccaṁ pahātuṁ asampajaññaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso vikkhepaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:6.3: Ariyānaṁ adassanakamyataṁ appahāya, ariyadhammassa asotukamyataṁ appahāya, upārambhacittataṁ appahāya—
root_text.an10.76:6.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme appahāya abhabbo muṭṭhassaccaṁ pahātuṁ asampajaññaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso vikkhepaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:7.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo ariyānaṁ adassanakamyataṁ pahātuṁ ariyadhammassa asotukamyataṁ pahātuṁ upārambhacittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:7.3: Uddhaccaṁ appahāya, asaṁvaraṁ appahāya, dussilyaṁ appahāya—
root_text.an10.76:7.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme appahāya abhabbo ariyānaṁ adassanakamyataṁ pahātuṁ ariyadhammassa asotukamyataṁ pahātuṁ upārambhacittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:8.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo uddhaccaṁ pahātuṁ asaṁvaraṁ pahātuṁ dussilyaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:8.3: Assaddhiyaṁ appahāya, avadaññutaṁ appahāya, kosajjaṁ appahāya—
root_text.an10.76:8.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme appahāya abhabbo uddhaccaṁ pahātuṁ asaṁvaraṁ pahātuṁ dussilyaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:9.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo assaddhiyaṁ pahātuṁ avadaññutaṁ pahātuṁ kosajjaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:9.3: Anādariyaṁ appahāya, dovacassataṁ appahāya, pāpamittataṁ appahāya—
root_text.an10.76:9.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme appahāya abhabbo assaddhiyaṁ pahātuṁ avadaññutaṁ pahātuṁ kosajjaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:10.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme appahāya abhabbo anādariyaṁ pahātuṁ dovacassataṁ pahātuṁ pāpamittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:10.3: Ahirikaṁ appahāya, anottappaṁ appahāya, pamādaṁ appahāya—
root_text.an10.76:10.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme appahāya abhabbo anādariyaṁ pahātuṁ dovacassataṁ pahātuṁ pāpamittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:11.2: So pamatto samāno abhabbo anādariyaṁ pahātuṁ dovacassataṁ pahātuṁ pāpamittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:11.3: So pāpamitto samāno abhabbo assaddhiyaṁ pahātuṁ avadaññutaṁ pahātuṁ kosajjaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:11.4: So kusīto samāno abhabbo uddhaccaṁ pahātuṁ asaṁvaraṁ pahātuṁ dussilyaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:11.5: So dussīlo samāno abhabbo ariyānaṁ adassanakamyataṁ pahātuṁ ariyadhammassa asotukamyataṁ pahātuṁ upārambhacittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:11.6: So upārambhacitto samāno abhabbo muṭṭhassaccaṁ pahātuṁ asampajaññaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso vikkhepaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:11.7: So vikkhittacitto samāno abhabbo ayonisomanasikāraṁ pahātuṁ kummaggasevanaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso līnattaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:11.8: So līnacitto samāno abhabbo sakkāyadiṭṭhiṁ pahātuṁ vicikicchaṁ pahātuṁ sīlabbataparāmāsaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:11.9: So vicikiccho samāno abhabbo rāgaṁ pahātuṁ dosaṁ pahātuṁ mohaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:11.10: So rāgaṁ appahāya dosaṁ appahāya mohaṁ appahāya abhabbo jātiṁ pahātuṁ jaraṁ pahātuṁ maraṇaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:12.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo jātiṁ pahātuṁ jaraṁ pahātuṁ maraṇaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:12.3: Rāgaṁ pahāya, dosaṁ pahāya, mohaṁ pahāya—
root_text.an10.76:12.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme pahāya bhabbo jātiṁ pahātuṁ jaraṁ pahātuṁ maraṇaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:13.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo rāgaṁ pahātuṁ dosaṁ pahātuṁ mohaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:13.3: Sakkāyadiṭṭhiṁ pahāya, vicikicchaṁ pahāya, sīlabbataparāmāsaṁ pahāya—
root_text.an10.76:13.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme pahāya bhabbo rāgaṁ pahātuṁ dosaṁ pahātuṁ mohaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:14.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo sakkāyadiṭṭhiṁ pahātuṁ vicikicchaṁ pahātuṁ sīlabbataparāmāsaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:14.3: Ayonisomanasikāraṁ pahāya, kummaggasevanaṁ pahāya, cetaso līnattaṁ pahāya—
root_text.an10.76:14.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme pahāya bhabbo sakkāyadiṭṭhiṁ pahātuṁ vicikicchaṁ pahātuṁ sīlabbataparāmāsaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:15.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo ayonisomanasikāraṁ pahātuṁ kummaggasevanaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso līnattaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:15.3: Muṭṭhassaccaṁ pahāya, asampajaññaṁ pahāya, cetaso vikkhepaṁ pahāya—
root_text.an10.76:15.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme pahāya bhabbo ayonisomanasikāraṁ pahātuṁ kummaggasevanaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso līnattaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:16.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo muṭṭhassaccaṁ pahātuṁ asampajaññaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso vikkhepaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:16.3: Ariyānaṁ adassanakamyataṁ pahāya, ariyadhammassa asotukamyataṁ pahāya, upārambhacittataṁ pahāya—
root_text.an10.76:16.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme pahāya bhabbo muṭṭhassaccaṁ pahātuṁ asampajaññaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso vikkhepaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:17.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo ariyānaṁ adassanakamyataṁ pahātuṁ ariyadhammassa asotukamyataṁ pahātuṁ upārambhacittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:17.3: Uddhaccaṁ pahāya, asaṁvaraṁ pahāya, dussilyaṁ pahāya—
root_text.an10.76:17.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme pahāya bhabbo ariyānaṁ adassanakamyataṁ pahātuṁ ariyadhammassa asotukamyataṁ pahātuṁ upārambhacittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:18.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo uddhaccaṁ pahātuṁ asaṁvaraṁ pahātuṁ dussilyaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:18.3: Assaddhiyaṁ pahāya, avadaññutaṁ pahāya, kosajjaṁ pahāya—
root_text.an10.76:18.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme pahāya bhabbo uddhaccaṁ pahātuṁ asaṁvaraṁ pahātuṁ dussilyaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:19.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo assaddhiyaṁ pahātuṁ avadaññutaṁ pahātuṁ kosajjaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:19.3: Anādariyaṁ pahāya, dovacassataṁ pahāya, pāpamittataṁ pahāya—
root_text.an10.76:19.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme pahāya bhabbo assaddhiyaṁ pahātuṁ avadaññutaṁ pahātuṁ kosajjaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:20.1: Tayome, bhikkhave, dhamme pahāya bhabbo anādariyaṁ pahātuṁ dovacassataṁ pahātuṁ pāpamittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:20.3: Ahirikaṁ pahāya, anottappaṁ pahāya, pamādaṁ pahāya—
root_text.an10.76:20.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo dhamme pahāya bhabbo anādariyaṁ pahātuṁ dovacassataṁ pahātuṁ pāpamittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:21.2: So appamatto samāno bhabbo anādariyaṁ pahātuṁ dovacassataṁ pahātuṁ pāpamittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:21.3: So kalyāṇamitto samāno bhabbo assaddhiyaṁ pahātuṁ avadaññutaṁ pahātuṁ kosajjaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:21.4: So āraddhavīriyo samāno bhabbo uddhaccaṁ pahātuṁ asaṁvaraṁ pahātuṁ dussilyaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:21.5: So sīlavā samāno bhabbo ariyānaṁ adassanakamyataṁ pahātuṁ ariyadhammassa asotukamyataṁ pahātuṁ upārambhacittataṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:21.6: So anupārambhacitto samāno bhabbo muṭṭhassaccaṁ pahātuṁ asampajaññaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso vikkhepaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:21.7: So avikkhittacitto samāno bhabbo ayonisomanasikāraṁ pahātuṁ kummaggasevanaṁ pahātuṁ cetaso līnattaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:21.8: So alīnacitto samāno bhabbo sakkāyadiṭṭhiṁ pahātuṁ vicikicchaṁ pahātuṁ sīlabbataparāmāsaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:21.9: So avicikiccho samāno bhabbo rāgaṁ pahātuṁ dosaṁ pahātuṁ mohaṁ pahātuṁ.
root_text.an10.76:21.10: So rāgaṁ pahāya dosaṁ pahāya mohaṁ pahāya bhabbo jātiṁ pahātuṁ jaraṁ pahātuṁ maraṇaṁ pahātun”ti.

translation_text.an10.76:1.1: “Mendicants, if three things were not found, the Realized One, the perfected one, the fully awakened Buddha would not arise in the world, and the teaching and training proclaimed by the Realized One would not shine in the world.
translation_text.an10.76:1.4: If these three things were not found, the Realized One, the perfected one, the fully awakened Buddha would not arise in the world, and the teaching and training proclaimed by the Realized One would not shine in the world.
translation_text.an10.76:1.5: But since these three things are found, the Realized One, the perfected one, the fully awakened Buddha arises in the world, and the teaching and training proclaimed by the Realized One shines in the world.
translation_text.an10.76:2.1: Without giving up three things you can’t give up rebirth, old age, and death.
translation_text.an10.76:2.4: Without giving up these three things you can’t give up rebirth, old age, and death.
translation_text.an10.76:3.1: Without giving up three things you can’t give up greed, hate, and delusion.
translation_text.an10.76:3.3: Substantialist view, doubt, and misapprehension of precepts and observances.
translation_text.an10.76:3.4: Without giving up these three things you can’t give up greed, hate, and delusion.
translation_text.an10.76:4.1: Without giving up three things you can’t give up substantialist view, doubt, and misapprehension of precepts and observances.
translation_text.an10.76:4.3: Irrational application of mind, following a wrong path, and mental sluggishness.
translation_text.an10.76:4.4: Without giving up these three things you can’t give up substantialist view, doubt, and misapprehension of precepts and observances.
translation_text.an10.76:5.1: Without giving up three things you can’t give up irrational application of mind, following a wrong path, and mental sluggishness.
translation_text.an10.76:5.3: Unmindfulness, lack of situational awareness, and scattered mind.
translation_text.an10.76:5.4: Without giving up these three things you can’t give up irrational application of mind, following a wrong path, and mental sluggishness.
translation_text.an10.76:6.1: Without giving up three things you can’t give up unmindfulness, lack of situational awareness, and scattered mind.
translation_text.an10.76:6.3: Not wanting to see the noble ones, not wanting to hear the teaching of the noble ones, and a fault-finding mind.
translation_text.an10.76:6.4: Without giving up these three things you can’t give up unmindfulness, lack of situational awareness, and scattered mind.
translation_text.an10.76:7.1: Without giving up three things you can’t give up not wanting to see the noble ones, not wanting to hear the teaching of the noble ones, and a fault-finding mind.
translation_text.an10.76:7.3: Restlessness, lack of restraint, and unethical conduct.
translation_text.an10.76:7.4: Without giving up these three things you can’t give up not wanting to see the noble ones, not wanting to hear the teaching of the noble ones, and a fault-finding mind.
translation_text.an10.76:8.1: Without giving up three things you can’t give up restlessness, lack of restraint, and unethical conduct.
translation_text.an10.76:8.4: Without giving up these three things you can’t give up restlessness, lack of restraint, and unethical conduct.
translation_text.an10.76:9.1: Without giving up three things you can’t give up faithlessness, uncharitableness, and laziness.
translation_text.an10.76:9.3: Disregard, being hard to admonish, and having bad friends.
translation_text.an10.76:9.4: Without giving up these three things you can’t give up faithlessness, uncharitableness, and laziness.
translation_text.an10.76:10.1: Without giving up three things you can’t give up disregard, being hard to admonish, and having bad friends.
translation_text.an10.76:10.3: Lack of conscience, imprudence, and negligence.
translation_text.an10.76:10.4: Without giving up these three things you can’t give up disregard, being hard to admonish, and having bad friends.
translation_text.an10.76:11.1: Mendicants, someone who lacks conscience and prudence is negligent.
translation_text.an10.76:11.2: When you’re negligent you can’t give up disregard, being hard to admonish, and having bad friends.
translation_text.an10.76:11.3: When you’ve got bad friends you can’t give up faithlessness, uncharitableness, and laziness.
translation_text.an10.76:11.4: When you’re lazy you can’t give up restlessness, lack of restraint, and unethical conduct.
translation_text.an10.76:11.5: When you’re unethical you can’t give up not wanting to see the noble ones, not wanting to hear the teaching of the noble ones, and a fault-finding mind.
translation_text.an10.76:11.6: When you’ve got a fault-finding mind you can’t give up unmindfulness, lack of situational awareness, and a scattered mind.
translation_text.an10.76:11.7: When your mind is scattered you can’t give up irrational application of mind, following a wrong path, and mental sluggishness.
translation_text.an10.76:11.8: When your mind is sluggish you can’t give up substantialist view, doubt, and misapprehension of precepts and observances.
translation_text.an10.76:11.9: When you have doubts you can’t give up greed, hate, and delusion.
translation_text.an10.76:11.10: Without giving up greed, hate, and delusion you can’t give up rebirth, old age, and death.
translation_text.an10.76:12.1: After giving up three things you can give up rebirth, old age, and death.
translation_text.an10.76:12.4: After giving up these three things you can give up rebirth, old age, and death.
translation_text.an10.76:13.1: After giving up three things you can give up greed, hate, and delusion.
translation_text.an10.76:13.3: Substantialist view, doubt, and misapprehension of precepts and observances.
translation_text.an10.76:13.4: After giving up these three things you can give up greed, hate, and delusion.
translation_text.an10.76:14.1: After giving up three things you can give up substantialist view, doubt, and misapprehension of precepts and observances.
translation_text.an10.76:14.3: Irrational application of mind, following a wrong path, and mental sluggishness.
translation_text.an10.76:14.4: After giving up these three things you can give up substantialist view, doubt, and misapprehension of precepts and observances.
translation_text.an10.76:15.1: After giving up three things you can give up irrational application of mind, following a wrong path, and mental sluggishness.
translation_text.an10.76:15.3: Unmindfulness, lack of situational awareness, and a scattered mind.
translation_text.an10.76:15.4: After giving up these three things you can give up irrational application of mind, following a wrong path, and mental sluggishness.
translation_text.an10.76:16.1: After giving up three things you can give up unmindfulness, lack of situational awareness, and scattered mind.
translation_text.an10.76:16.3: Not wanting to see the noble ones, not wanting to hear the teaching of the noble ones, and a fault-finding mind.
translation_text.an10.76:16.4: After giving up these three things you can give up unmindfulness, lack of situational awareness, and scattered mind.
translation_text.an10.76:17.1: After giving up three things you can give up not wanting to see the noble ones, not wanting to hear the teaching of the noble ones, and a fault-finding mind.
translation_text.an10.76:17.3: Restlessness, lack of restraint, and unethical conduct.
translation_text.an10.76:17.4: After giving up these three things you can give up not wanting to see the noble ones, not wanting to hear the teaching of the noble ones, and a fault-finding mind.
translation_text.an10.76:18.1: After giving up three things you can give up restlessness, lack of restraint, and unethical conduct.
translation_text.an10.76:18.4: After giving up these three things you can give up restlessness, lack of restraint, and unethical conduct.
translation_text.an10.76:19.1: After giving up three things you can give up faithlessness, uncharitableness, and laziness.
translation_text.an10.76:19.3: Disregard, being hard to admonish, and having bad friends.
translation_text.an10.76:19.4: After giving up these three things you can give up faithlessness, uncharitableness, and laziness.
translation_text.an10.76:20.1: After giving up three things you can give up disregard, being hard to admonish, and having bad friends.
translation_text.an10.76:20.3: Lack of conscience, imprudence, and negligence.
translation_text.an10.76:20.4: After giving up these three things you can give up disregard, being hard to admonish, and having bad friends.
translation_text.an10.76:21.1: Mendicants, someone who has conscience and prudence is diligent.
translation_text.an10.76:21.2: When you’re diligent you can give up disregard, being hard to admonish, and having bad friends.
translation_text.an10.76:21.3: When you’ve got good friends you can give up faithlessness, uncharitableness, and laziness.
translation_text.an10.76:21.4: When you’re energetic you can give up restlessness, lack of restraint, and unethical conduct.
translation_text.an10.76:21.5: When you’re ethical you can give up not wanting to see the noble ones, not wanting to hear the teaching of the noble ones, and a fault-finding mind.
translation_text.an10.76:21.6: When you don’t have a fault-finding mind you can give up unmindfulness, lack of situational awareness, and a scattered mind.
translation_text.an10.76:21.7: When your mind isn’t scattered you can give up irrational application of mind, following a wrong path, and mental sluggishness.
translation_text.an10.76:21.8: When your mind isn’t sluggish you can give up substantialist view, doubt, and misapprehension of precepts and observances.
translation_text.an10.76:21.9: When you have no doubts you can give up greed, hate, and delusion.
translation_text.an10.76:21.10: After giving up greed, hate, and delusion you can give up rebirth, old age, and death.”
